repair_candidate.summary: Repair existing maintainer-editable contributor PR #90942 by rebasing branch fix/doctor-sandbox-symlink-script-resolution onto current main feae1faf064354e14c385ac8bc0cc003be12a006. Preserve the narrow symlinked-launcher sandbox setup-script lookup fix, resolve only rebase conflicts, validate the changed surface, run Codex /review, and push the same contributor branch.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(doctor): follow symlinked launcher when locating sandbox setup scripts
repair_candidate.pr_body:
What Problem This Solves
- Refreshes #90942 so `openclaw doctor` can locate sandbox setup scripts when launched through a symlinked bin in source or linked-install layouts.

Why This Change Was Made
- Current main still has the literal argv1 sandbox-script lookup, while the shared package-root resolver already follows symlinked launchers. The existing contributor fix should be preserved and rebased, not broadened.

User Impact
- After the PR is finalized later, symlinked launcher layouts such as pnpm/npm link can use doctor sandbox image repair when the scripts exist in the checkout.

Evidence
- Rebase onto main feae1faf064354e14c385ac8bc0cc003be12a006.
- Run `pnpm test src/commands/doctor-sandbox.test.ts src/infra/openclaw-root.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`.
- Run Codex /review after the rebase and address any findings before handoff.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @sasan1200 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90942.
Do not open a replacement PR; repair the maintainer-editable contributor branch directly.
Keep #90951 out of this repair because it is the adjacent package-install setup-script shipping/product-decision gap, not the symlinked launcher bug.
